candidates.row_label: Depreciation and amortization in Cost of sales
candidates.why: This is the explicit COGS-related D&A header/summary, but it appears directly under the already selected parent row 'Cost of sales' and functions as a component within that bucket rather than a separate same-level operating line to add on top.
This is a nested 'thereof' component under the COGS D&A area, so adding it separately would risk double counting versus the selected 'Cost of sales' bucket.
This is a specific depreciation component within cost of sales/cost of revenues, not a separate same-level line outside the selected COGS parent.

variables.notes: Selected COGS parent is '[Income Statement] Cost of sales'. The visible COGS D&A rows are presented as sub-components within that parent bucket, so no separate COGS_DA row should be added.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and amortization in Sales and distribution costs
candidates.why: This is the sales/distribution D&A header within the already selected parent row 'Sales and distribution costs', so it appears embedded in that selected bucket rather than separate from it.

candidates.row_label: Amortization in Sales and distribution cost
candidates.why: This is a component of the selected 'Sales and distribution costs' row and should not be added separately.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in sales and distribution cost
candidates.why: This is another component line under the selected sales/distribution expense bucket, so separate addition would double count.
This appears to be a broad SG&A D&A header around the administrative section, but the actual quantified rows below are components within selected SG&A buckets, not separate same-level rows to add.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles excluding Goodwill in SGA
candidates.why: This amortization row sits within the selected administrative/SG&A expense area and therefore appears embedded in the chosen XSGA components.
This is a component of the selected parent row 'Administrative expenses', so it should not be added separately.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This is an R&D D&A component under the selected 'Research and development costs' line. Because R&D is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, adding R&D D&A separately would distort the intended XSGA minus XRD construction.
This is an R&D depreciation sub-component under the selected R&D row, and the same R&D bucket is already handled in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD.
This row appears beneath the selected parent 'Other operating expenses, net', so it looks like a component already embedded in that chosen XSGA bucket rather than a separate line to add.
This row also appears under the selected parent 'Other operating expenses, net' and therefore looks embedded in the chosen XSGA bucket.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA bucket is the combined set of '[Income Statement] Sales and distribution costs', '[Income Statement] Administrative expenses', '[Income Statement] Research and development costs', and '[Income Statement] Other operating expenses, net'. The visible D&A rows are presented as sub-components within those selected parent rows, not as separate same-level operating lines. R&D D&A is also excluded because 'Research and development costs' is already mapped to both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD.
